image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: A tiny device that changed everything: the transistor.
Context visual: Transistors amplify and switch electrical signals, forming the backbone of digital computing.
Escalation visual: Before transistors, computers were massive and unreliable. Now? They're in your pocket!
Evidence visual: Invented in 1947, it marked the dawn of the electronics age, sparking a revolution.
Payoff visual: From smartphones to supercomputers, the transistor is everywhere. Imagine a world without it!
Cta visual: Curious about more tech marvels? Hit follow and explore with us!
